Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides professional skills for employment in language education and develops assessment tools (OPI) used for job qualification, linking to Target 8.5.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: By improving language assessment fairness through '分析試題優劣' (analyzing test quality), the course supports equal opportunity for non-native speakers, linking to Target 10.3.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The focus on fair and objective assessment methods can be inferred as promoting non-discriminatory practices within educational institutions, a micro-level link to Target 16.b.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course references international standards like 'ACTFL' and '國內外各類華語測驗', implying knowledge sharing and international cooperation in education, relevant to Target 17.6.
